title: TerraTrove
description: Unofficial Modpack made by the staff team of TerraTrove SMP
body:
# Unofficial Modpack for TerraTrove SMP

This pack was made for users who are not well versed in Curating their personal modpacks, and is intended to be used on a wiki post on our website. It's mainly performance focused and lacks most of the popular quality of life mods, but you may easily add any extra content and customize to your liking through Modrinth App. There are a select few quality of life mods present in the pack mainly improving the video settings menu gui and the **Simple Voice Chat** mod, as it's needed for Proximity voice chat to work. You may delete it if you wish to opt out of the in-game voice chat feature.
We will continue updating the modpack as new game versions come out or new and noticeably effective performance mods are released. It is fully compatible and has been tested on some of the most fps tanking areas of the server on a relatively old setup yielding satisfactory results.

The list of mods present in this pack is as follows. (🟢 Before the name indicates the presence of that specific mod in the latest released version):

🟢 [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations): Micro optimizations

🟢 [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud): HUD improvements to mounts like horses and camels

⚪ [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric): Replaces ping bars with numerical equivalent in the tab menu

🟢 [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config): Dependency for other mods

🟢 [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric): Improved chunk generation/loading

🟢 [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps): Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background / idle / on battery

🟢 [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling): Only entities visible on your screen are rendered

🟢 [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api): Core mod

🟢 [Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping): Faster ping / connection to servers

🟢 [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core): Optimizes memory usage

⚪ [Idle Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/idletweaks): More idle caps to reduce resource usage in background

🟢 [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast): Optimizations to the rendering of different elements of the game

🟢 [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton): Network optimizations

🟢 [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium): Optimizations to game physics / mob AI / block ticking

🟢 [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu): Management center for configuring your mods

⚪ [ModernFix-mVUS](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix-mvus): improves performance / reduces memory usage / fixes many bugs in modern Minecraft versions

🟢 [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling): Handles and manages how different types of culling occurs

🟢 [Packet Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/packet-fixer): Various packet related error fixes
(will be removed soon since it requires server-side)

⚪ [Raknetify](https://modrinth.com/mod/raknetify): Improves stability for poor connections

🟢 [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options): Improved settings UX

🟢 [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux): Improved light updates

🟢 [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat): Proximity voice chat in-game

🟢 [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium): Under the hood graphical and stutter improvements resulting in better FPS

🟢 [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra): Adds the options to further control the visual elemnts of the game

🟢 [Stfu](https://modrinth.com/mod/shuttfup): Improvements! (check the mod's description)

🟢 [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api): Dependency for other mods

🟢 [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl): Dependency for other mods

### Disclaimers:
- This pack is not neccessary for being able to connect to the server and play, rather a headache free means of enjoying a more optimised minecraft experience for our java players.
- This is not a resource / shader pack.
- TerraTrove is not affiliated in any way to any of the 3rd party content used in this pack.
- All rights are reserved for the owners of the individual mods used in this modpack and by installing it you are agreeing to their terms of use.

Feel free to test it out for yourself and if you're looking for a chill, adults only Minecraft community, check out our [Website](https://terratrove.net/) and [Discord server](https://discord.gg/TerraTrove)!
